scripts.check:docs: bash -lc "test -f README.md && test -f docs/agents/AGENTS.md && test -f docs/agents/tests.AGENTS.md && test -f docs/planning/Project\ Scope.md && test -f docs/planning/Agent_Migration_Plan.md"
scripts.build: npm run build:frontend && npm run build:control-plane
scripts.check:rs: cargo fmt --manifest-path services/rust-ingestion-worker/Cargo.toml --check && cargo clippy --manifest-path services/rust-ingestion-worker/Cargo.toml -- -D warnings
scripts.check:py: cd services/ai-scoring && python3 -m ruff check . && python3 -m ruff format --check . && python3 -m pyright .
scripts.check:sh: npx --yes shellcheck scripts/*.sh scripts/ci/*.sh scripts/data/*.sh scripts/qa/*.sh
scripts.check:sonar: npm run check:js && npm run check:types && npm run check:orchestrator && npm run test:sonar:coverage && npm run check:control-plane && npm run check:rs && npm run check:py && npm run check:sh
scripts.check: npm run check:js && npm run check:rs && npm run check:py && npm run check:sh && npm run check:types && npm run check:md && npm run check:orchestrator && npm run check:control-plane
